query: The Eiffel Tower is located in the capital of which country?

evidence_segments.title: Eiffel Tower
evidence_segments.text: The Eiffel Tower is located in Paris.

evidence_segments.title: Paris
evidence_segments.text: Paris is the capital city of France.

distractor_segments.title: Madrid
distractor_segments.text: Madrid is the capital city of Spain.

distractor_segments.title: Rome
distractor_segments.text: Rome is the capital city of Italy.

query: The author of 1984 was born in which country?

evidence_segments.text: 1984 is a novel written by George Orwell.

evidence_segments.title: George Orwell
evidence_segments.text: George Orwell was born in Motihari, British India.

distractor_segments.title: United Kingdom
distractor_segments.text: George Orwell later worked in England.

distractor_segments.title: Animal Farm
